changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_ownership ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, vehicle_id BIGINT NOT NULL, owner_id BIGINT NOT NULL, ownership_start DATE, ownership_end DATE, is_current BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE vehicle_ownership IS 'Current and historical ownership records per vehicle';
